seed_instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email.
org_constraint: The email should be formatted with three concise paragraphs and include at least four uppercase words.
new_constraint: Limit uppercase words in the email to one per paragraph.
instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email. The email should be formatted with three concise paragraphs and include at least four uppercase words. Limit uppercase words in the email to one per paragraph.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Molecular Biology Research Opportunities

Dear Professor [Last Name], I am writing to express my strong INTEREST in joining your laboratory for undergraduate research in molecular biology. As a dedicated student with a background in genetics, I have long admired your work on gene regulation and would love to contribute to your ongoing projects.

My coursework has provided me with a solid foundation in cell biology, and I am eager to apply these skills in a practical setting. I believe that working under your guidance would be an invaluable experience for my academic and professional growth.

Please let me know if there are any upcoming positions available or if you would be open to a brief meeting to discuss this further. Thank you for your time and consideration of my request.
